q1_url_shape.note: Both pages were navigated via clean /maps/place/<Name> slugs; the SPA immediately rewrites location.href to a coordinate+hash URL. No clean template survives.

non_canonical_components: lat/lng coordinates (redundant with data= blob, can differ by rounding)
!1s<hex_cid>:<hex_cid2> — internal place CIDs, not stable public IDs
g_ep=<base64> — ephemeral session/experiment token, changes per request
url_analysis.verdict: URL is GARBAGE for canonicalization. The g_ep token is ephemeral. The data= segment is opaque proto-encoded. The place name in the path IS present but the full URL is non-templatable due to coordinates+blob+session token.

count_delta_pct.heading: 10 vs 9 (~10% diff)
count_delta_pct.article: 4 vs 2 (Eiffel has Directory section, Liberty has At this place section — both use article role)

structural_sections_present_in_both: main panel with place name heading
Actions region (Directions, Save, Nearby, Send to phone, Share)
Reviews heading + sort/filter radiogroup + 3 reviewer generics
similarity_analysis.similarity_method: Jaccard over role-presence bag; all 22 roles shared except 1 (textbox in Eiffel's Directory search box). Count magnitudes differ <20% across all roles. Section ordering identical.
similarity_analysis.verdict: HIGHLY SIMILAR — virtually identical skeleton. The Maps place page template is a fixed shell; content slots (name, reviews, photos, popular times) differ but the role structure and section ordering are deterministic.

q3_data_id_check.verdict: data-item-id is sparse (4 per page, ~0.18% density) and data-cid is absent entirely. aria-label is by far the richest semantic hook (~306/303 elements, ~13.5% density). jsaction attributes are plentiful (~220) but are behavioral, not identity hooks. Maps does NOT expose clean stable data-ids for structural anchoring.

overall_verdict.q1_evidence: URL contains ephemeral g_ep session token, opaque proto-encoded data= blob, floating-point lat/lng coordinates that differ between requests. The place name slug is the only readable component but the full URL is non-templatable.
overall_verdict.q2_evidence: 96% role-bag similarity across two completely different landmark pages. Identical section ordering. 21/22 AX roles shared. Node counts differ by ~6% (1721 vs 1615) — within normal content-volume variance.
overall_verdict.q3_evidence: data-item-id: 4 elements per page (0.18%). data-cid: 0. aria-label: ~305 (13.5%) — the only usable stable hook, and it IS structural (aria-label on regions, tabs, buttons).
overall_verdict.one_line_verdict: CONFIRMED: Google Maps place pages have non-templatable, ephemeral URLs AND a highly stable (96% similar) AX role skeleton across places — structural tier hypothesis wins on this target.
